archimate:DataObject.name: ODRL
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Description: The Organization Ontology is a standardized representation of organizational structures, roles, and relationships within the field of Linked Data and the Semantic Web. It provides a framework for describing and modeling various aspects of organizations, such as their hierarchy, departments, employees, and roles.
Publisher: W3C
Source: https://www.w3.org/TR/vocab-org/
LOST view: Semantic view
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/ODRLDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/ODRLDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/Ontology

properties.value: The Organization Ontology is a standardized representation of organizational structures, roles, and relationships within the field of Linked Data and the Semantic Web. It provides a framework for describing and modeling various aspects of organizations, such as their hierarchy, departments, employees, and roles.
